title: Automatic Cat Feeder, 4L Cat Food Dispenser with 10s Voice Recorder, Pet Feeder up to 8 Meals per Day, Timed Dog Feeder with Dry Food Sealed Ring
bullet_points: 【Smooth feeding， No food blockage】-Have you encountered any issues with the food cardholder not coming out while using the feeder? Are you still troubled by constantly shaking the feeder to let food flow out? Our automatic pet feeder comes with a food distribution system that ensures smooth and even feeding of food into the feeding bowl during the automatic feeding program. The detailed design and comprehensive functionality can free up your hands and time, allowing you to no longer worry about pet feeding.

【Custom voice recording】-You can record 10s voice to keep connected with your pets. When the feeding time you set is up, the system will automatically play your recording 3 times to shout for your pet to come and eat. Your voice will keep a close relationship with your pet and also let your pet eat with peace of mind.

【Fresh food prioritizes health】-The automatic cat feeder features a finger broadcasting lid opening device at the top to prevent your pet from stealing food. We have designed a desiccant placement box in our food dispenser, the design can completely isolate the air to prevent food from getting damp and moldy. We have included a desiccant to ensure the freshness of pet food.

【Ensure smooth feeding】- We have designed a food swinging device in the food dispenser to ensure that food can be smoothly placed into the feeding bowl from getting stuck. The feeding bowl of our automatic cat feeder is designed to tilt 8 degrees to ensure that your pet can eat in a comfortable position.

【Two power supply options available】- Use the 5V DC adapter while supplying the automatic cat food dispenser via 3 alkaline batteries(not included) installed in case of power outages, to ensure that your cat gets food consistently.

【Scheduled Automatic Feeding】-Are you still worried about forgetting to feed your pets? Are you still worried about not being able to feed your pets while on a business trip? Are you still worried about falling asleep after the party and not feeding your pet? Our automatic cat feeder is equipped with a programmable feeding display screen, which accurately and punctually runs the feeding time and amount you set, allowing your cat to eat healthily and regularly.

bullet_points: Smart APP Control: Wi-Fi fully automatic dog feeder is 5GHz and 2.4GHz WiFi-enabled allowing you to program your pet's meals anywhere anytime through the PETLIBRO App on your iOS or Android smartphone.

Personalized Meal Call: Record a voice message for up to 10 seconds that plays for each feeding, and freely set the times the meal call play, so your pet can feel your care even when you're not at home. Smart Notifications and Indicators: Your phone receives notifications and the machine’s indicators also lights up red when the food tank of the cat feeder automatic is empty, food gets jammed, the battery is low, or has other problems. The infrared sensor keeps checking and stops food dispensing if the food outlet is blocked.

title: Automatic Cat Feeder with 2K Camera: 5G WiFi Automatic Dog Feeder with Night Vision,Cat Food Dispenser with 7L Large Food Storage Container for Multiple Pet,Detachable for Easy Clean -29 Cup
bullet_points: Go Out of Town Without Worrying : When you are traveling, attending a party or up too late to feed your pet at home, smart automatic cat feeder will regularly schedule your pet's daily food for you. No matter where you are, you can monitor your pet's daily routine and diet, as well as change your feeding schedule online, anytime, anywhere via the mobile app.

Feeding Schedule ( Regular Diet ) : Setting up a scientific feeding schedule for your pet (up to 15 meals per day, with a maximum of 20 portions per meal) with automatic dog feeder will not only improve your pet's eating habits, but also save pet owners' valuable time (you don't have to constantly think about whether your pet is getting food or not). Not only can you view your pet's feeding history in the app, but you can also view how much food is left in the dog food bowl via the camera.

Record Wonderful Moments ( Life ) : The Full HD 3 megapixel camera on the cat feeder automatic perfectly records every moment your pet is playing at home. Even when night falls, the infrared sensor in the camera provides clear night vision. It not only supports shooting and recording, but also supports storing data in TF card and cloud storage. (TF card supports up to 128GB) When you turn on motion detection, the APP will remind you when your cat is doing activities.

Dual-band WiFi : The Frienhund automatic cat feeder with camera supports dual-band WiFi (2.4GHz & 5GHz). Dual-band network lets you don't have to modify your router for channel compatibility issues. Faster 5G networks allow for more stable, crisp video quality.

Stay Close to Your Pet : “ Two-way Audio ” allows you to talk to your pet in real time. If your cat is sensitive to sound, you can adjust the volume of the feeder through the “Device Volume” in the APP. auto cat feeder supports various terminal logins, in addition to remote control via mobile phone or tablet, you can also log in to the IPC terminal via PC browser to keep your mischievous cat or dog company at all times.

Dog Food Storage Container : 7L (29 Cups) Large capacity cat food storage with desiccant continuously provides your cats or large dogs with fresh food for weeks. The 360° transparent food tank makes it easy to visualize how much food is being consumed.

No Longer Knocked Over : Are you angry about the active cats or large dogs in your house always knocking over the dog food bowl? The auto cat feeder is specially designed for this purpose with a carabiner design, you can flexibly attach automatic pet feeder to the wall so that you don't have to worry about the food bowl being knocked over by your pets anymore.

Clean More Thoroughly ( Detachable ) : The automatic cat food dispenser （BPA-Free） has a removable food tank and stainless steel bowl. Individually disassembled Food Tank can be cleaned more thoroughly. Stainless steel bowls can be placed in the dishwasher for cleaning. These removable designs make eating more hygienic for your pet.

Dual Power Supply : The cat feeder has two power supply systems. DC 5V power adapter for daily use of the dog feeder. The 3 D cell batteries ensure your pet has a continuous supply of food when your home loses power. You can enjoy your vacation or work away from home with peace of mind. ( Dual power supply recommended )

Pet Lovers : Frienhund offers a free one-year warranty and 24/7 online service for automatic feeders. The automatic cat feeder is designed for all pet lovers like me, if you have any problems, you can contact us by order, email, or phone. We will solve your problem until it is solved.

title: Timed Automatic Cat Feeder 2 Cats with Slow Feed: Dual Automatic Dog Feeder with Information Visualization, Programmable Auto Cat Food Dispenser for Multiple Pets,Detachable for Clean-29 Cup
bullet_points: Easy to Read : Unlike standard timed cat feeder with cramped interfaces, our upgraded 2.4-inch screen offers crystal-clear visibility at a glance. Easily verify your pet’s entire feeding schedule without navigating complex menus. The intuitive layout displays the full schedule (up to 6 meals/day, 1-9 portions/meal) and status icons—including the Slow Feeding Mode indicator—so you always know your cat is being fed exactly as planned.

Conflict-Free Dining : Designed specifically for multi-cat households, our automatic cat feeder separates the bowls by a generous 18.7 inches. Unlike narrow splitters that force cats into uncomfortable proximity, this extended distance provides ample "personal space." It effectively reduces food aggression and anxiety, ensuring both cats can eat simultaneously and peacefully without one waiting for the other to finish.

Large Dog Food Storage Container : Eliminate the need for daily refills. The spacious 7L (29 Cups) transparent hopper holds enough dry food to sustain multiple cats or small dogs for weeks—perfect for short trips or busy schedules. The automatic dog feeder includes a built-in desiccant box to lock in freshness, keeping kibble crunchy. The 360° clear view allows you to monitor food levels instantly, so you’ll know exactly when it’s time to top up without opening the lid.

Scientific Slow Feeding Mode : Stop "Scarf and Barf" (eating too fast and vomiting) before it starts. By activating the Slow Feeding Mode, the cat feeder automatic dispenses a portion every minute until the meal is complete. This controlled pace effectively prevents choking, regurgitation, bloating, and obesity. Unlike traditional slow feeding bowls that can be chewed or flipped, our integrated system ensures a consistent, calm dining experience. When the "SLOW" icon illuminates, your pets are protected by a smarter, medically-sound feeding rhythm.

Clean More Thoroughly ( Detachable ) : Say goodbye to "cat acne". Our auto cat feeder features a BPA-free removable food tank and premium stainless steel bowls. The entire unit disassembles in seconds, allowing for a deep, thorough clean of every corner. The stainless steel bowls are 100% dishwasher-safe, making it effortless to provide a clean dining environment that keeps your pet’s skin healthy and their breath fresh.

Dual Power Protection: Rest easy knowing your pets are cared for, even during unexpected power outages. Never miss a meal. This cat automatic feeders operates on a 5V DC adapter for daily use, backed by 3 D-cell batteries (not included) as an emergency failsafe. Whether it’s a local blackout or a tripped circuit while you’re on vacation, the system automatically switches to battery power to ensure the feeding schedule remains uninterrupted. Enjoy your trips or long workdays with 100% peace of mind.

Tip-Proof & No More Messy Spills: Tired of active pets knocking over their automatic pet feeder and leaving a mess on your floor? Our cat food dispenser features a rock-solid triangular structure. For even more security, it includes a carabiner for wall-mounting, ensuring even the most energetic cats or dogs can’t budge it. Say goodbye to tipped-over bowls and wasted food—finally, a cat feeder that stays exactly where you put it.

Compatible with Various Dry Foods : The automatic feeder's shaft is made of elastic silicone. It is well compatible with various types of dry food within 15mm, including Freeze Dried Food, Air Dried Food, Multi Pieced Food, etc. Intake of different types of food ensures that your pet has rich nutrition.

Anti-Bite Nylon Braided Wire : The specially made anti-bite nylon braided line of this dual automatic cat feeder can effectively prevent your line-biting pet from chewing it. This will be your best protection when you go out of town.

Pet Lovers : Frienhund offers a free one-year warranty and 24/7 online service for our automatic cat feeder 2 cats. The automatic cat feeder is designed for all pet lovers like me, if you have any problems, you can contact us by order, email, or phone. We will solve your problem until it is solved.

bullet_points: Key Benefits: Prevents food stealing and stress at mealtimes in multi-pet homes, keeps your pets healthier by controlling portions and helping to keep weight under control, saves money by not overfeeding expensive prescription foods and helping to avoid vet bills related to pet health conditions.
Great for Pets on Prescription Diets: Holds 13.5 fl. oz, wet or dry pet food. The lid closes to form a seal with the neoprene lip, helping to retain moisture and to keep food fresher longer.

Microchip Compatibility: Works with 9 (Avid Secure), 10 (FDXA) and 15 (FDXB) digit microchip numbers; if unsure of your pet’s microchip number, you can check with your veterinarian, pet shelter or animal rescue. Automatic Cat Feeder opens when the assigned pet microchip ID approaches, and closes when it moves away. Simple one button programming.
Three Year Warranty. Veterinarian Recommended.

Do you have a houseful of pets? Does one cat steal the other’s cat food? Does your dog steal the cat’s food? Stressful Feeding times? The Microchip Pet Feeder makes feeding times so much easier! It uses the pet’s Microchip ID or by wearing a lightweight RFID collar tag to communicate with the feeder to open for that specific pet. All feeders come standard with one tag (unit stores 32 ID’s); additional collar tags can be purchased separately if necessary. Ideally one feeder per pet.
description_text: The SureFeed Microchip Pet Feeder only opens for a registered pet’s veterinary implanted microchip or RFID collar tag to prevent pets stealing each others’ food. One collar tag is supplied with the product. This feeder is ideal for multi-pet households to prevent greedy pets becoming overweight and to ensure prescription or life-stage food is consumed by the right pet. The lid of the feeder closes onto a sealed bowl, which keeps food fresher. One single grey bowl, one split grey bowl and one grey mat is included - additional bowls and mats in grey, green, pink and blue can be purchased separately. Stainless steel bowls are also available. The training mode closes the lid in stages to help timid pets get used to the movement. The product includes a three-year warranty.   • Why is there water and Ice chips in the cooling area?

    The appearance of condensed water in the cooling area is a natural result of the feeder interacting with air during refrigeration. Wipe the area dry with a towel after each feeding plan for optimal maintenance.

  • How should the feeding bowl be cleaned?

    The feeding bowl is dishwasher-safe (up to 158℉/70℃) or can be hand-washed with water for easy upkeep.

  • How long can wet food stay in the food bowl? Will it continue to refrigerate food after 72 hours without resetting?

    The feeder preserves wet food for up to 72 hours. Even after a feeding plan ends, the cooling function remains active to maintain freshness. However, for your pet's health, we recommend cleaning up any leftover food promptly once feeding concludes.

  • How does the "OPEN NOW" function work?

    If you do not set any meal schedules, the "FEED NOW" function can help to open any meal anytime anywhere. If meal schedules have already been set, it can help to open the previous and next meal to ensure any meals will not be wasted.

  • What is the recommended ambient temperature for using the automatic cat feeder?

    For optimal cooling and food preservation, we suggest using the feeder in environments between 53°F–86°F (12°C–30°C). To maintain its efficiency, please avoid direct sunlight, high temperatures, and humid conditions.

  1. How to set up the scheduled feeding?

    Set up in the unlock mode


    Step 1: Press & hold the “Lock” button for 3S, then press “Set” button MEAL icon is blinking.

    Step 2: Set the number of meals per day——press the UP & DOWN button to choose 1-6 meals per day, then press the SET button to save.

    Step 3: When time icon 0000 is flashing, press the UP & DOWN button to set feeding hour/minute/portion for the first meal.

    Step 4: Set the 2nd/3rd/4th/5th/6th meal in the same way.

  2. How to manual feeding?

    Set up in the unlock mode


    Step 1: Press & hold the “Lock” button for 3s to unlock the screen.

    Step 2: In unlocked mode, press both UP & DOWN button together to manual dispense 1 portion.

    Note: Manual feeding that doesn't affect the scheduled feeding.

    Set up in the locked mode


    Step 1: Press & hold the “Lock” button for 3s to unlock the screen.

    Step 2: Press & hold the UP button for 5s to reset all settings (time,feeding plan and number of meals per meal, recording).

    Step 3: Hear "didi" indicate clear recording is complete.

aplus_html:
Product description

Have A Timed Automatic Pet Feeder For Your Pet

A pet feeder with a digital timer allows you to enjoy the flexibility of customizing the meal times and food quantity you want your pets to eat, ensure your pet gets the food they need when they need it! If you are troubled with high boarding costs, pet overweight, or can't feed pet on time? Auto pet feeder is a good helper.


Petory is a new high-tech company dedicated to designing and producing smart feeding products for pets. What we pursue is to use technology to solve problems, use products to link love.

  • 1 x Auto Pet Feeder (4L)
  • 1 x 5V Source Adapter
  • 1 x 6.6Ft Type-C Cable
  • 1 x Stainless Steel Bowl
  • 1 x Desiccant Bag
  • 1 x User Manual

Why Choose Petory F01 Pet Feeder?

Petory has patented airtight structure, even if the feeder is moved or rocked, the dispenser will not drop extra food. It only dispenser food on schedule. Furthermore, Petory F01 allows you to set the intervals between each portion dispensed if you want your pet to eat slower for instance. This is particularly handy for pets with health issues like obesity or overweight.

  • Suitable for cats and dogs
  • Timed schedule with slow feed
  • Up to 6 meals per day
  • 10-500g per meal
  • Backup battery (battery not included)
  • 10s voice recording
  • Hold up to 16.9 cups dry food
  • Replaceable Food Rotor

Food-Level Indication

The transparent viewing window allows you to easily monitor the food level and refill timely.

Infrared Sensor

Stop the dispenser if there's already food in the outlet. Keep food fresh and prevent overflow.

Simple Disassembly

Counterclockwise rotation can take out the hopper and the hopper is dishwasher clean.

Setting Locked

Prevent changing settings due to the pets' mistake touch.

Keep food fresh

A desiccant bag can keep food fresh. Recommended to replace once a month.

Reduce Bacterial Growth

The stainless steel bowl is easy to clean and can hold 10.6oZ food.

Anywhere Anytime Always - ON YOUR PET SIDE

Warm Tips

  • Please change the desiccant every month. Recommend 1.77*2.36in desiccant bags.
  • Suitable for size 0.2-0.7in dry, freeze, and air-dried food.
  • Use 3 alkaline D-cell batteries to source. Don't use rechargeable batteries. Or you can choose rechargeable feeder (B0BX69P6TF).
  • 1 portion about 1/10cup (5tbsp). For reference only, there are errors with the measurements.
  • The recording will not be played from 10:00 pm to 7:00 am by default.
  • If sourced by batteries only and without operation for 2 minutes, the display will turn off automatically to extend battery work time. Press any button can awaken it.
  • To turn off the feeder, just press that side of the button "O" at the bottom, no need to unplug the source cord.

bullet_points: SCHEDULE YOUR PET'S MEALS: Conveniently schedule up to 12 meals per day for your cat or dog; best for cats and small to medium sized dogs

U.S.-BASED CUSTOMER CARE: Our pet product experts are here to help you and your pet and are available by phone, email or chat if you have any questions

description_text: Say goodbye to the early morning wake up meow or nose boop. The Healthy Pet Simply Feed will serve your pet breakfast so you can get more shuteye. description_html:
Pawsync Automatic Cat Feeder
Proper feeding can ensure the freshness of food, offer meal plans and methods, and comprehensively manage your pet's diet like a dedicated caretaker.

Feed your pet easier with proper use

  • Compatible Food: The feeder works well with freeze-dried food, mixed food, dry food, and air-dried food. Do not use wet, canned, or moist food.

  • Allowed Kibble Size: Use dry kibble that is between 0.2-0.6 inches (4-15 mm) in size.

  • Suitable Shapes: The feeder can handle regular single shapes such as round, cylindrical, square, mixed shapes, freeze-dried mixed dry food. Irregular shapes (such as star shapes) may cause jamming and are not recommended for use.

  • Correct Placement: Place the feeder on a stable surface free from nearby obstructions or vibrations, as these may impact the scale's accuracy. For indoor use only.

  • Portion Size: One portion is about 1/11 cup, depends on kibble size.

  • Easily Clean: All parts in contact with food can be easily disassembled for cleaning.

description_text: Mealtime is made simple and stress-free with the PetSafe 5 Meal Pet Feeder. Perfect for cats and small to medium-sized dogs, this programmable feeder ensures your pet never misses a meal, whether it’s breakfast, lunch, dinner, or snack time. The digital timer allows you to schedule up to five meals in advance, each served down to the minute, so your pet’s feeding routine stays consistent and reliable. One tray section is available for immediate feeding, while the remaining four rotate automatically at scheduled times. This makes it easy to stick to portion control, prevent overeating, and maintain a healthy daily diet for your pet. Each of the five compartments holds up to one cup of dry or semi-moist food, making it versatile enough for kibble, jerky bites, or freeze-dried treats. The feeder is also a great solution for pets that eat too quickly, allowing you to divide their meals into smaller servings throughout the day. The tray is fully removable and dishwasher safe for quick cleaning, giving you a hygienic and low-maintenance feeding station. Product description

Say goodbye to hard-to-clean pet water containers. Our innovative auto refill dog water bowl features a brilliantly wide-mouth design, any adult & child, man or woman can easily insert their entire hand deep into the bottle to scrub every surface. Engineered to make cleaning effortless and thorough, ensure your dog always drinks fresh, clean, and hygienic water. (Recommend to clean the tank inside once a week)

1. Unlike flimsy alternatives on the market, our tank is built to last with thickness 2X greater than most competing products, prevents cracks and damage.

2. Strategic ridges and grooves are designed for a secure and comfortable grip, making it easy and safe to lift and place the bottle back onto its base, especially when the bottle is full of water.

3. Constructed from safe and transparent plastic, the bottle allows you to monitor water level and quality at a single glance. Ensure your pet always have clean, fresh water.

The tank is NOT dishwasher safe.

The drinking bowl is crafted from premium, durable 304 food-grade stainless steel, ensuring your dog have last long healthy and clean water drinking. The bowl is effortlessly removable from the base with a simple lift, allows for quick and thorough cleaning—simply rinse it directly under running water or place it in the dishwasher for a hassle-free wash.

The base is equipped with four high-performance non-skid pads. These are not ordinary pads, they are upgraded with a tough, automotive-grade rubber compound, similar to that used in car tires. This advanced material provides superior grip and exceptional durability, firmly anchoring the auto water dispenser in place, and will not slide or be pushed around by your dog, even on smooth floor.

  • Why is there water and Ice chips in the cooling area?

    The appearance of condensed water in the cooling area is a natural result of the feeder interacting with air during refrigeration. Wipe the area dry with a towel after each feeding plan for optimal maintenance.

  • How should the feeding bowl be cleaned?

    The feeding bowl is dishwasher-safe (up to 158℉/70℃) or can be hand-washed with water for easy upkeep.

  • How long can wet food stay in the food bowl? Will it continue to refrigerate food after 72 hours without resetting?

    The feeder preserves wet food for up to 72 hours. Even after a feeding plan ends, the cooling function remains active to maintain freshness. However, for your pet's health, we recommend cleaning up any leftover food promptly once feeding concludes.

  • How does the "OPEN NOW" function work?

    If you do not set any meal schedules, the "FEED NOW" function can help to open any meal anytime anywhere. If meal schedules have already been set, it can help to open the previous and next meal to ensure any meals will not be wasted.

  • What is the recommended ambient temperature for using the automatic cat feeder?

    For optimal cooling and food preservation, we suggest using the feeder in environments between 53°F–86°F (12°C–30°C). To maintain its efficiency, please avoid direct sunlight, high temperatures, and humid conditions.

title: PAPIFEED Automatic Cat Feeder 3L/12 Cup,2.4G WiFi Pet Feeder with APP Control for Remote Feeding, 1-10 Meals Low Power Automatic Cat Food Dispenser with Stainless Steel Bowl, Easy Clean Detachable
bullet_points: 【2.4G WIFI Remote APP Control】 When the automatic cat feeder is connected to the 2.4GHz WiFi, you can feed your pet anytime and anywhere via the Smart APP, no more worrying about your pet being home alone and not being fed. You can also set up a daily feeding schedule via the APP for regular feedings, relieving you of the burden of getting up early to feed. The Smart APP not only allows you to view feeding records, but also to share control with family members.（Note: Only supports 2.4GHZ not 5GHZ）

【Customized Healthy Diet】Say no to your pet’s irregular healthy diet. Customize a healthy eating habit for your pet from now on. Easily set up and schedule feeding times based on your pet's needs, even while you're enjoying your vacation outdoors. papifeed automatic pet feeder creates a consistent daily feeding schedule to ensure your pet is eating regularly. (Max 10 meals per day, 1-6 servings each)

【Let Alexa Feed Your Pet】Our auto cat feeder supports Echo devices with Alexa, with a simple command, you can let your Amazon Echo devices feed your pet anywhere in your home. And you can customize the voice commands and the number of servings you feed.

【Slow Feeder & Portion Control】 When your cat or dog is bloated, you can manually feed it through the "Feed" button in the app, extend the feeding interval, and control the portion size of each meal, helping greedy pets eat at a healthier pace. Controlling food intake can help pets control their food intake, so that they can develop good eating habits, avoid overeating, and not become overweight. Our pet feeder can set a feeding schedule of up to 10 meals per day, with 1-6 servings per meal.

【Eat Fresh Food At Any Time】PAPIFEED automatic pet feeder storage has an air-sealed design. Desiccant bags and safety-lock lids not only keep food fresh, they also prevent your pet from accessing stored food. At the same time, the 360° visual transparent trough design also facilitates us to visually observe food consumption.

【Dual Power Mode】The PAPIFEED dog food dispenser has two power systems. You can use the DC 5V power adapter for long-term power or use 4 AA batteries（Battery not included）for regular power. Even if the power goes out, the automatic feeder with battery backup will continue feeding so your pet won't go hungry. If the power goes out and there is no battery inside, the meal settings will be remembered when the power comes back on.（Note: 4 AA batteries are not included. The battery is for emergency power supply and has a standby time of about 15 hours. It cannot be connected to the internet when using battery power）

【Easy to Clean ( BPA Free )】The PAPIFEED cat food dispenser with timer comes with a food-grade, safe and odorless removable stainless steel bowl. It makes cleaning easier and keep your beloved pet's fur clean. PAPIFEED auto feeder not only cares about reducing the feeding workload of pet owners, but also cares about the hygiene of pets during the feeding process.

Product description

Automatic feeder and waterer dispenser set, dog cat food feeder and waterer, Large Capacity 1 Gallon x 2. If you need to travel for a few days, you don't have to worry about your cute pet not having enough food at home.

Our automatic pet feeder set is suitable for all pets, small and large dogs, cats and rabbits, etc.

The best choice to buy our automatic feeder and waterer set.

Automatic Dog Cat Feeder and Water Dispenser

Feeder and waterer set

Pets may eat a lot on the first day of use, but our pets are smarter than we thought, and they will slowly quit this bad habit. Don't worry about eating a lot because you changed the automatic feeder.

The working principle of the auto waterer: When the water in the water tank reaches a certain height, the spring device in the middle of the bucket mouth will automatically close and the water stops flowing; when the water is below a certain height, the spring device will automatically open and continue to flow out.

Our dog cat feeder and water dispenser adopt food-grade plastic material, non-toxic no strange smell, please feel free to use.

Features of feeder and waterer set

  • Automatic gravity flow technology
  • Food grade materials
  • The top cover on the feeder
  • Non-slip rubber feet
  • Provide fresh water and food at all times
  • Easy to clean
  • Siphon device design

Siphon device design

When the water in the water tank reaches a certain height, the spring device will automatically close, the water will stop flowing, and it can also prevent water leakage.

Anti-slip design

The base is sturdy and not easy to tip over. The four corners are all anti-slip design, safe and stable.

Easy to clean

The bucket and the chassis can be separated and can be washed directly with water. It is recommended to wash once a week!

Unique export design

The large-caliber food outlet facilitates the grain to come out from here, and will not cause the food to become stuck.It also makes it easy for us to clean the feeder.

Large capacity Dog cat feeder and water dispenser

Pets can automatically enjoy fresh and clean food and water when you are out for a few days, and there is no need to feed them every day, which is convenient for your pets and yourself.

Dog cat Water Dispenser

The water feeder can meet the drinking needs of medium and large dogs for 2-5 days. If it is a kitten or puppies, the water feeder can last up to 7 days.

Dog cat Feeder

The convenient automatic pet feeder will reduce your workload of feeding medium and large dogs for 1-2 days. If it’s a kitten or puppy, you don’t need to worry that your cute pet will feel hungry within 3-7 days after the feeder is full.

title: iPettie FW54 5G/2.4GHz WiFi Automatic Feeder and Waterer 2-in-1 Set for Pets, 300 oz Large Capacity for 2 Weeks, Perfect for Working Parents
bullet_points: 2-in-1 Design: This Gravity Water Dispenser and Smart WiFi Feeder combo features a spacious 123 oz water reservoir and a 176 oz food storage area, perfect for meeting the daily needs of cats and small to medium-sized dogs. Pets can enjoy clean, non-recirculated water on demand.

Remote Control via App: Easily manage feeding schedules and portions from anywhere with our user-friendly app. Features include clog detection, voice feeding reminders, alerts for replacing desiccants, and ensuring your pets are fed on time, even on your busiest days.

Versatile Food Compatibility: Our feeder accommodates a variety of dry food types, including freeze-dried, puffed, and dehydrated foods, with a size range of 3-14 mm. The innovative design prevents clogging and ensures a smooth, consistent flow of food.

Two-Way Power Supply: Never worry about power outages or internet disruptions! This feeder supports two power options, prioritizing adapter power to utilize the app function, with a battery backup to ensure pets are fed consistently, even if the power goes out.

Advanced Freshness Features: Enjoy four layers of food preservation, including a 360° sealed silicone ring to keep moisture out, a moisture-proof storage container, separate compartments for food and water, and a hidden food outlet that closes automatically after dispensing. This ensures optimal freshness and pest protection.

  • Does this pet water dispenser need to be powered?

    It doesn't need power source, gravity drinking water design.

  • What is the maximum capacity of this water dispenser?

    The maximum capacity is 6.5L.

  • Is this product easy to clean?

    It is easy to assemble and easy to clean, and it also comes with a bendable brush to clean every corner of the bottle.

  • How Can I clean this automatic gravity water dispenser?

    Just 4 steps to disassemble the water dispenser: 1.Take off the water bottle 2. Unscrew the cap 3. Pull out the bowl base. 4. Take out the 304 stainless bowl.

    • Stainless steel bowl: Dishwasher safe

    • All other parts: Hand wash recommended

  • What is the material of this waterer?

    lts body is made of high quality Pp material. The water bowl is made of 304 stainless steel, it is more durable and friendly.
